name: python3-shellingham
title: python3-shellingham
description:
Tool to Detect Surrounding Shell
Shellingham detects what shell the current Python executable is
running in.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-shellingham because Tool to Detect Surrounding Shell.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-shellingham as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-shellingham with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-shellingham --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
